Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case ID 2 Violation 1 Risk Assessment before Credit Check Evidence The log shows Risk Assessment occurred at 0820 while Credit Check occurred later

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The normative rule requires Credit Check Risk Assessment Skipping Credit Check before Risk Assessment invalidates the sequence This is a serious procedural breach

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Violation 2 Finalize Documentation after Rejection Evidence Finalize Documentation occurred at 1000 after Loan Decision Rejected at 0930

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The normative rule explicitly states If the loan is rejected the case should be closed without finalizing documentation Performing Finalize Documentation after rejection contradicts this rule and is not allowed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Conclusion Case ID 2 violates multiple normative rules both the sequence order and post decision logic

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case ID 1 No normative violations and all steps follow the required sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Credit Check Timing Occurred 30 minutes after application within 24 hours so meets timing recommendation Applicant Notification 2 hours later well within 48 hour window

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Follow up Call Not recorded in the log missing but since it is optional and not logged we can assume it either occurred off record or was skipped without consequence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Conclusion Case ID 1 fully complies with both normative rules and desiderata

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case ID 3 Sequence is correct Application Credit Check Risk Assessment Decision Notification Finalize Approved Close No violations of strict sequence or decision logic

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Credit Check Delay Took 5 days to perform the Credit Check exceeds 24 hour window so violates timing desideratum Applicant Notification Delay Took 2 days to inform applicant exceeds 48 hour window so violates timeliness recommendation

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Follow up Call Not recorded missing though optional

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Conclusion Case ID 3 violates several desiderata though not normative rules behavior is suboptimal but still procedurally valid

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Summary Case 1 no normative violations and no desiderata violations Case 2 yes normative violations and no desiderata violations Case 3 no normative violations and yes desiderata violations

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 2 likely reflects either procedural inexperience or system misconfiguration where steps are out of order or automation fails to enforce sequence

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The fact that Credit Check occurs after Risk Assessment suggests a possible data access issue or workflow misrouting Additionally finalizing documentation post rejection may indicate a lack of conditional logic in the system

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Case 3 shows delays in process execution possibly due to manual review bottlenecks organizational policies requiring longer review cycles or batch processing and non real time communication

Name: Validation - PE
Text: While Case 3 is not normatively invalid it represents inefficiency and could impact customer satisfaction aligning with the spirit of desiderata to improve responsiveness
